title: Everything
description: The complete archive. Every piece John posted, from the earliest DMV sketches to the final Inktober runs. 216 images, two decades of work, no filter.

title: DMV
description: John's flagship original IP. AJ (America Jones) is a combat-trained meter maid in the not-too-distant dystopian cyberpunk future, where a 6x3 metre rectangle of road surface is the most contested real estate imaginable. Recurring cast includes Drew, the Repobot, and a parking ticket dispenser as the deadliest sidearm in the city.

title: Daniel Dukke & Ferdinand Fox
description: John's first original creation. Daniel Dukke and Ferdinand Fox — and the Hench Bunnies who served them.

title: The Streamers
description: Military-branch magical girls, each representing a branch of the U.S. armed forces. Navy Girl (Mayflower Shipman), Air Force Girl (Ariel McFly), Army Girl, Coast Guard Girl, Marine Corps Girl. Their enemies include T.H.R.E.A.T. and the CIRCE weapon. Includes the full Inktober 2018 run.

title: N.E. Boox
description: The Most Dangerous Bookstore. Molly Mouse runs the place. Cassandra is the cat-girl. The store is defended by Bookwyrms and robotic dalmatians. An original IP that never got enough time but always had a great name.

title: Space Girls / GELFs
description: Sabrina and the Genetically Engineered Life Forms, piloting Giant Space Robots. Early concept work that shows where John's head was when he was building worlds from scratch.

title: The High School Romance
description: Lori the evil prom queen. OttØ the robot bad boy. The wrench girl. Erin Scissorhands. A giant robot football player. A high school drama that operates at its own altitude — part rom-com, part mecha, entirely John.

title: Evil Diva
description: Fan art for Angry Viking Press's indie comic about a demon girl who wants to be an angel. Diva Beelze, Mom Beelze, guidance counsellor Loki, principal Virgil. A demonic high school where the supernatural is purely administrative.

title: Princeless
description: Fan work for Jeremy Whitley's series. Adrienne Ashe, Sparky the dragon, Bedelia, Xingtao. Includes a Big Planet Comics exclusive variant cover for Princeless: The Pirate Princess #1, shipping January 2015.

title: Gold Digger
description: Fred Perry's Gold Digger. Skippy Von Richthofen — John's honest answer to the question of which character he'd most want to draw a comic of. Also Brianna (the perfect woman, apparently), Gina, and Tiffany and Charlotte.

title: Chibi Heroines
description: John's ongoing chibi heroine series — Batgirl, Storm, Starbuck, Harley Quinn, Baroness, Mikasa. The format is his own; the subjects are borrowed with obvious love. Sits between fan art and original concept.

title: Anime Fan Art
description: Bubblegum Crisis, Robotech, El Hazard, Cowboy Bebop, Gundam Girls, Neon Genesis Evangelion, Silent Möbius, and others. Classic catalogue with deep affection. One bucket that earns its place.

title: Star Trek
description: The full Inktober 2016 run — 31 chibi and super-deformed Trek ships across every faction: Klingon, Romulan, Dominion, Federation. Deep fandom with strong opinions about canon. His thoughts on Enterprise remain correct.

title: Published Work
description: Guest artist on Empowered Special #4: Animal Style (Adam Warren). Contributor to Hammer of the Gods (Mike Avon Oeming). Variant cover work and convention commissions. The professional side of the archive.
